description: POST each object to http://localhost:8080/api/crops (Content-Type: application/json) to seed or extend crop catalog.

sampleCrops.name: Rice
sampleCrops.pesticides: Neem-based spray every 10 days; monitor blast per local advisory.

sampleCrops.name: Wheat
sampleCrops.pesticides: Seed treatment; rust fungicide if needed.

sampleCrops.name: Maize
sampleCrops.pesticides: Stem borer IPM; avoid peak pollinator spraying.

sampleCrops.name: Sugarcane
sampleCrops.pesticides: Early shoot borer traps and approved insecticides.

sampleCrops.name: Chickpea
sampleCrops.pesticides: Pod borer IPM; botanicals where feasible.

expectedResponseShape.pesticides: Neem-based spray every 10–14 days; monitor blast and sheath blight per local advisory.
expectedResponseShape.waterRequirements: Loamy soil in Kharif (monsoon): holds moisture well. Rely on rainfall when adequate; supplement only if topsoil dries beyond ~10–12 cm between rains. Avoid over-irrigation—improve field drains to prevent waterlogging.

suggestAiExample.note: Exact cropName and numbers depend on the ML model output and DB row. Start FastAPI (uvicorn) and MySQL before testing.
